typography.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl font-bold tracking-tight text-primary

header.style: sticky top-0 z-50 backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/90 border-b border-slate-200
header.elements: Logo/Name (left), Title (center, hidden on mobile), Emergency Phone CTA (right)

hero.style: relative w-full bg-slate-900 flex items-center justify-center min-h-[70vh] md:min-h-[80vh]
hero.content: Text-white, left-aligned, emphasizing 24/7 availability for OPJ/Tribunaux

emergency_badge.style: inline-flex items-center gap-2 px-4 py-2 rounded-full bg-red-600/10 text-red-500 border border-red-500/20 font-semibold text-sm

service_card.style: bg-white border border-slate-200 p-8 hover:shadow-lg transition-all duration-300 rounded-none md:rounded-sm

floating_mobile_cta.style: fixed bottom-4 left-4 right-4 bg-red-600 text-white p-4 rounded-xl shadow-2xl flex items-center justify-center gap-2 font-bold text-lg z-50 md:hidden

images.description: Palais de Justice architecture, used as a subtle, dark-overlaid background in the hero section to establish institutional authority.
Abstract white marble texture to be used at low opacity (10-20%) as a background for the 'Statut Professionnel' or 'Services' section to break up solid white blocks.

icons.usage_examples: PhoneCall (Urgency/Contact), Scale (Justice/Cour d'appel), MapPin (Zone d'intervention), Globe2 (Languages), Clock (24/7 Availability), ShieldCheck (Legitimacy)

accessibility.contrast_requirements: Ensure WCAG AA contrast. Navy text on white is fully compliant. Red buttons must use white text. All links and buttons need explicit focus states.
accessibility.interactions: Interactive elements must have distinct hover states (e.g., hover:bg-slate-800 for primary buttons).

testing.attributes: Add data-testid attributes to all interactive elements (e.g., data-testid='hero-phone-cta', data-testid='whatsapp-link', data-testid='mobile-emergency-fab').

instructions_to_main_agent: Build a single-page landing application with vertical scrolling.
Target audience is OPJ and police/justice officials. Tone must be strictly institutional, reassuring, and completely non-commercial.
The hero section should use the provided 'hero_background' image with a heavy dark overlay. The text over it must be white and highly legible.
Ensure the sticky header displays the fictional professional name, title ('Interprète-Traducteur Judiciaire'), and a highly visible phone button.
Implement the 'Disponibilité 24/7' prominently in the hero section using the emergency badge style.
Structure the 'Services' section clearly: Garde à vue, Audition libre, Comparution immédiate, Interprétariat général.
List the languages clearly: Anglais, Arabe, Amazigh/Berbère/Kabyle.
Highlight the 'Expert près la Cour d'appel' and 'Auto-entrepreneur' status to build trust.
Include a clear interactive map or listed zone for intervention (Paris, 75, 92, 93, 94, 77, 78, 91, 95).
Add the Mobile Sticky FAB (Floating Action Button) for emergency calling on small screens (md:hidden).
Do NOT add a contact form, just direct links: Phone (tel:), Email (mailto:), WhatsApp.
